title: Rules at the Park
learningGoal: The learner will verbally construct sentences asking for permission and stating strict prohibitions using the Te-form.
instructions: In this roleplay, you are talking to a park guard. Ask for permission to play, then listen to the guard's response and verbally state a rule based on the prompt.

contentItems.text: Remember to pronounce the 'wa' clearly in 'te wa ikemasen'.

speakingPrompt: Translate: 1) May I play here? 2) Yes, it's fine. 3) You must not run here.
scenario: A conversation between a visitor and a guard at a park.

subTasks.prompt: Ask the guard for permission. Say: 'May I play here?'

sampleResponse.targetText: ここで あそんでも いいですか。
sampleResponse.transliteration: Koko de asonde mo ii desu ka.

subTasks.prompt: Act as the guard giving permission. Say: 'Yes, it's fine.'
Act as the guard stating a rule. Say: 'You must not run here.'

sampleResponse.targetText: ここで はしってはいけません。

scenarioContext.targetText: すみません、しつもんが あります。
scenarioContext.baseTranslation: Excuse me, I have a question.

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: ここで あそんでも いいですか。
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Koko de asonde mo ii desu ka.

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: ここで はしってはいけません。

expectedSpeakingPoints: Say Koko de asonde mo ii desu ka
Say Koko de hashitte wa ikemasen
acceptableParaphrases: Dropping 'koko de' in the third sentence is acceptable since context implies it.

criteria.name: Permission Structure
criteria.description: Did the learner accurately say 'asonde mo ii desu ka'?

criteria.name: Prohibition Structure
criteria.description: Did the learner accurately say 'hashitte wa ikemasen' with correct 'wa' pronunciation?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: ここで あそんでも いいですか。はい、いいですよ。ここで はしってはいけません。

feedbackRules.onPass: Fantastic speaking! You perfectly articulated the permission and prohibition rules.
feedbackRules.onFail: Review the Te-form for 'Hashirimasu'. It drops the 'ri' and adds 'tte'. -> Hashitte.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good try! Make sure you pronounced 'wa ikemasen' instead of 'ha ikemasen'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: すみません、しつもんが あります。ここで あそんでも いいですか。はい、いいですよ。ここで はしってはいけません。

hintText: To play is Asobimasu. Use the mi/bi/ni rule: nde. -> Asonde.
